name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 6 Dec 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release marks the launch of the revamped UI for the A/B Campaign."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"A|B Campaigns – UI Revamp","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Working towards our commitment to user experience transformation, the A/B campaign UI pages have been redesigned. As part of this redesign, you’ll find improvements to the A/B Campaign creation flow and the A/B Reports dashboard."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"A/B Campaign Creation Flow","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The A/B campaign creation flow has been redesigned as per our current design standards. While there are no functional changes, you’ll find the new design to be visually appealing and more user-friendly."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The campaign creation flow consists of two steps – step 1 collects the campaign details and step 2 collects the split group details for the A/B testing. The test email and pre-send calculation functionalities can be found in step 2."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-AB-Campaigns","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating A/B Campaigns","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here's a screenshot of the New A/B Campaign page:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignStep1.0685g00000BHYjgAAH.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignStep1.0685g00000BHYjgAAH.jpg","name":"A_B_Campaign_Step_1","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":3444,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"A|B Reports Dashboard","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The look and feel of the A/B reports have been improved. The reporting data is now clearly organized and labeled for better readability. The engagement metrics are displayed at the beginning of the report – with the most important metrics available as engagement cards for a quick glance."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This is followed by Overview – containing campaign information, Conversions – containing orders and revenue information, and Details – containing other campaign details, such as contact lists and tags used in the campaign."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/AB-Campaign-Reports","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"A/B Campaign Reports","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here's what the A/B Campaign report dashboard looks like:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABReportEngagement.0685g00000BHYjbAAH.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABReportEngagement.0685g00000BHYjbAAH.png","name":"A|B Report - Engagement","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2372,"width":2560}}]}]
